<?php namespace Illuminate\Routing\Controllers; use Closure; use Illuminate\Support\Arr; class Middleware { /** * Create a new controller middleware definition. * * @param \Closure|string|array $middleware * @param array<string>|null $only * @param array<string>|null $except */ public function __construct(public Closure|string|array $middleware, public ?array $only = null, public ?array $except = null) { } /** * Specify the only controller methods the middleware should apply to. * * @param array|string $only * @return $this */ public function only(array|string $only) { $this->only = Arr::wrap($only); return $this; } /** * Specify the controller methods the middleware should not apply to. * * @param array|string $except * @return $this */ public function except(array|string $except) { $this->except = Arr::wrap($except); return $this; } }
